subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto all who dwell upon the earth, that it may draw them unto God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. Say: O peoples of the earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی من علی الارض لیجذبهم الی الله المهیمن القیوم بگو یا اهل ارض
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
